name: asset-director
description: Composite asset pipeline coordination, cost governance, and provenance tracking

name: creative-director
description: Taste enforcement, archetype personality, GAP-FIX authoring, and Design DNA stewardship

name: master-orchestrator
description: Project-level coordination, state ownership, and wave routing across all pipeline phases

name: mobile-director
description: Mobile framework routing (Swift/Kotlin/RN/Expo/Flutter), HIG compliance, and store submission

name: narrative-director
description: Cross-section story arc coherence, emotional beat sequencing, and arc validity enforcement

name: protocol-director
description: A2A traffic management, schema validation, and inter-agent error routing

name: quality-director
description: 394-point quality gate verdicts, hard gate enforcement, and Playwright visual QA coordination

name: research-director
description: Parallel research orchestration, SOTD benchmarking, and competitive analysis coordination

name: scene-director
description: Persistent 3D canvas management, cross-section camera choreography, and WebGPU/WebGL routing

name: wave-director
description: Per-wave section routing, parallel dispatch, and merge coordination

name: a11y-polisher
description: Applies accessibility polish: ARIA labels, focus management, color contrast corrections, and keyboard navigation.

name: agent-trace-ui-author
description: Builds agent trace visualization UI with AG-UI event stream rendering and step-by-step thought display.

name: api-route-author
description: Authors framework-native API routes with Zod validation, error handling, and OpenAPI documentation.

name: archetype-researcher
description: Researches archetype-specific visual references, color systems, typography precedents, and motion language.

name: astro-section
description: Builds a single page section as an Astro component with DNA tokens, island hydration strategy, and 4-breakpoint layout.

name: awwwards-judge-simulator
description: Simulates Awwwards SOTD judge scoring across 4 axes: Design, Usability, Creativity, Content. Targets 8.0+ average.

name: axe-runner
description: Runs axe-core accessibility audit against deployed preview. Reports WCAG 2.1 AA violations with fix guidance.

name: brand-voice-enforcer
description: Reviews all copy against extracted brand voice guidelines. Rewrites passages that deviate from tone, vocabulary, or personality.

name: bundle-analyzer
description: Analyzes production bundle composition. Flags oversized chunks, duplicate dependencies, and tree-shaking failures.

name: character-poser
description: Applies poses and expressions to character models. Validates against brand character consistency guidelines.

name: chat-ui-author
description: Builds AI chat UI components with Vercel AI SDK v4, streaming responses, and DNA-themed message bubbles.

name: ci-pipeline-author
description: Authors GitHub Actions or CI pipeline with Lighthouse CI, Playwright preview smoke, and quality gate checks.

name: cms-schema-introspector
description: Introspects CMS schemas via GROQ (Sanity), CMA (Contentful), or OpenAPI (Payload). Maps content types to DNA sections.

name: color-critic
description: Evaluates color system against DNA tokens, contrast ratios, and archetype color rules. Checks for token drift.

name: competitor-analyzer
description: Analyzes competitor sites for design quality, UX patterns, conversion strategies, and differentiation opportunities.

name: contentful-author
description: Authors Contentful content model definitions and GraphQL query fragments with DNA token field mappings.

name: conversion-critic
description: Evaluates conversion readiness: CTA clarity, social proof placement, friction reduction, and conversion gate compliance.

name: dna-reverse-engineer
description: Extracts Design DNA from captured CSS variables and computed styles. Runs pixel-kmeans with ΔE2000 perceptual distance.

name: docker-author
description: Authors Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for self-hosted deployment with standalone Next.js output.

name: edge-function-author
description: Authors Vercel Edge Functions with streaming responses, geolocation logic, and bot detection integration.

name: email-template-author
description: Authors React Email or MJML transactional email templates with DNA-aligned styling and dark mode support.

name: expo-author
description: Builds Expo managed workflow apps with EAS Build config, Expo Router, OTA updates, and config plugin setup.

name: faq-author
description: Authors FAQ content with structured data markup. Targets featured snippet eligibility and GEO citation patterns.

name: first-time-visitor-critic
description: Simulates first-time visitor experience: 5-second test, clarity of value proposition, and confusion points.

name: flutter-author
description: Builds Flutter widgets with ThemeData DNA mapping, go_router navigation, Riverpod state, and platform adaptive widgets.

name: flux-hero-gen
description: Generates hero background images using Flux API with DNA-matched color palettes and beat-type visual language.

name: gltf-lod-generator
description: Generates multiple LOD variants for GLTF models. Validates triangle counts and texture sizes against perf budgets.

name: gsap-choreographer
description: Authors GSAP ScrollTrigger and timeline sequences bound to DNA motion tokens. Enforces reduced-motion variants and performance budgets.

name: hero-camera-choreographer
description: Authors camera keyframe sequences for hero and cinematic sections. Produces Theatre.js or GSAP ScrollTrigger camera paths tied to DNA motion tokens.

name: hubspot-integration-author
description: Scaffolds HubSpot CRM integration: forms, contact sync, marketing automation hooks, and CMS API.

name: hydrogen-integration-author
description: Scaffolds Shopify Hydrogen storefront with Oxygen deployment config, Remix routes, and DNA-bound storefront components.

name: inpainter
description: Runs inpainting workflows to fix, extend, or composite image assets. Preserves DNA color accuracy in edited regions.

name: interaction-replay-fitter
description: Fits Playwright traces to 7 cubic-Bezier easing presets and generates MOTION-INVENTORY.md with exact preset matches.

name: kotlin-author
description: Builds Jetpack Compose UIs with Material You DNA bridge, adaptive layouts for foldables, and ViewModel architecture.

name: ktx2-encoder
description: Encodes textures to KTX2/Basis format for GPU-compressed delivery. Validates format support matrix.

name: legal-doc-author
description: Authors privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie consent documents with jurisdiction-specific clauses.

name: lighthouse-runner
description: Runs Lighthouse CI against preview deployments. Enforces perf budget thresholds and flags CWV regressions.

name: lottie-author
description: Authors Lottie animation JSON for micro-animations and brand motion sigils. Validates file size and frame rate targets.

name: medusa-integration-author
description: Scaffolds Medusa v2 headless commerce integration with product catalog, cart, and checkout flows.

name: meshy-prototyper
description: Rapid 3D prototype generation via Meshy API. Produces low-fidelity models for layout and proportion validation.

name: microcopy-author
description: Authors UI microcopy, CTA text, tooltips, and error messages aligned with brand voice and anti-slop gate.

name: microcopy-polisher
description: Final microcopy review and polish: tightens CTAs, removes filler words, enforces anti-slop gate, checks brand voice.

name: morph-target-author
description: Generates morph target animations for character and product 3D models. Validates blend shape count against performance budget.

name: motion-critic
description: Evaluates motion design against quality gate: intentionality, DNA motion token usage, reduced-motion compliance.

name: n8n-workflow-author
description: Authors n8n automation workflow JSON for lead capture, CRM sync, and notification pipelines.

name: nano-banana-iterator
description: Runs iterative image editing via nano-banana MCP. Applies DNA color corrections, style transfers, and beat-specific atmosphere adjustments.

name: narrative-critic
description: Evaluates cross-section story arc coherence, beat sequencing validity, and emotional progression.

name: nextjs-section
description: Builds a single page section as a Next.js RSC with Tailwind v4 DNA tokens, animation, and 4-breakpoint responsive layout.

name: og-image-author
description: Authors dynamic OG image generation routes with next/og, DNA typography, and brand color templates.

name: pattern-miner
description: Extracts reusable design patterns from reference sites. Identifies cross-archetype techniques and innovation opportunities.

name: payload-author
description: Authors Payload CMS collection and global definitions with DNA-themed admin UI and access control policies.

name: perf-polisher
description: Applies performance polish: image optimization, lazy loading, bundle splitting, and CWV budget validation.

name: playwright-test-author
description: Authors Playwright E2E tests for critical user journeys, visual regression baselines, and accessibility checks.

name: polisher
description: Applies final polish pass: micro-interactions, hover states, focus rings, loading skeletons, and transition refinements.

name: pricing-author
description: Authors pricing tier copy, feature bullets, and CTA text optimized for conversion. Applies cognitive load gate.

name: prisma-schema-author
description: Authors Prisma schema from content and data requirements. Generates migrations and type-safe client bindings.

name: propstack-integration-author
description: Scaffolds Propstack real estate CRM integration: property listings, search, and lead capture forms.

name: r3f-scene-builder
description: Builds React Three Fiber scene components with Rapier physics, DNA-bound materials, and postprocessing pipeline.

name: rag-pipeline-author
description: Scaffolds RAG pipeline with Supabase pgvector, embedding generation, and retrieval-augmented generation routes.

name: react-vite-section
description: Builds a single page section as a React component with Vite, DNA tokens, Framer Motion, and 4-breakpoint responsive layout.

name: recraft-vector-author
description: Generates SVG vector assets via Recraft API. Binds vector colors to DNA tokens for runtime theming.

name: reduced-motion-variant-author
description: Generates prefers-reduced-motion CSS/JS variants for every animated section. Ensures WCAG 2.1 compliance without sacrificing design intent.

name: reference-library-curator
description: Curates and indexes reference sites and assets into the project reference library. Manages semantic search index.

name: rive-author
description: Authors Rive state machine definitions for interactive brand animations. Wires inputs to user interaction events.

name: rn-author
description: Builds React Native bare workflow components with NativeWind DNA bridge, React Navigation v7, and Reanimated 3.

name: rodin-3d-gen
description: Generates 3D model assets via Rodin API. Produces GLTF output ready for scene-director pipeline.

name: sanity-author
description: Authors Sanity schema definitions, GROQ queries, and DNA-themed Studio components for content management.

name: scroll-driven-css-author
description: Authors native CSS scroll-driven animations using @keyframes with animation-timeline. Provides JS-based fallback for unsupported browsers.

name: shopify-integration-author
description: Scaffolds Shopify Storefront API integration: product listings, cart, checkout, and DNA-themed product display.

name: sitemap-author
description: Authors XML sitemaps (standard, image, video, news) with changefreq, priority, and hreflang entries.

name: sitemap-crawler
description: Recursive BFS sitemap crawl with per-sitemap error events. Captures HTML, computed styles, and 4-breakpoint screenshots.

name: skeptic-persona-critic
description: Applies skeptical buyer persona: challenges trust signals, probes objection handling, and tests social proof credibility.

name: sotd-scout
description: Scouts recent Awwwards SOTD winners in the target vertical. Extracts design patterns, score benchmarks, and differentiators.

name: spline-embed-author
description: Authors Spline scene embed components with lazy loading, DNA color injection via Spline events API, and reduced-motion fallback.

name: storybook-story-author
description: Authors Storybook stories for all shared components with controls, docs, and accessibility addon integration.

name: stripe-integration-author
description: Scaffolds Stripe payment integration: checkout session, subscription management, webhook handling, and payment element theming.

name: supabase-integration-author
description: Scaffolds Supabase integration: auth, Postgres schema, RLS policies, realtime subscriptions, and storage config.

name: sveltekit-section
description: Builds a single page section as a SvelteKit component with DNA tokens, Svelte transitions, and 4-breakpoint responsive layout.

name: swift-author
description: Builds SwiftUI views with DNA token mapping to SwiftUI design tokens, SF Symbols, NavigationStack, and HIG compliance.

name: synthetic-persona-prober
description: Runs synthetic user personas through the full page journey. Validates task completion, confusion points, and conversion path.

name: telemetry-ingester
description: Ingests RUM and synthetic telemetry. Tracks CWV trends, error rates, and user flow drop-offs against SLO budgets.

name: testimonial-author
description: Authors realistic testimonial copy with persona diversity and conversion-optimized framing. Flags synthetic content for disclosure.

name: theatre-sequencer
description: Authors Theatre.js project files for complex multi-object animation sequences. Binds sequence values to DNA motion tokens.

name: trend-scout
description: Identifies emerging design and UX trends relevant to the project vertical. Flags trends conflicting with archetype.

name: typography-critic
description: Evaluates typography against quality gate axis: scale discipline, hierarchy clarity, archetype font personality, and readability.

name: upscaler
description: Upscales raster assets to target resolution using AI super-resolution. Validates output sharpness and artifact levels.

name: vercel-config-author
description: Authors vercel.json with routing rules, edge config, caching strategies, and environment variable schema.

name: video-reel-gen
description: Generates DNA-parameterized video reel assets via Remotion or video gen APIs. Outputs AVIF/MP4/WebM.

name: visual-refiner
description: Closed-loop visual refinement: captures Playwright screenshots, compares against reference targets, applies corrections until delta converges.

name: vitest-author
description: Authors Vitest unit and integration tests for utilities, hooks, and component logic with coverage targets.

name: vr-snapshot-taker
description: Captures 4-breakpoint visual regression snapshots via Playwright. Diffs against baseline and flags regressions.

name: vue-section
description: Builds a single page section as a Vue 3 SFC with DNA tokens, GSAP/VueUse motion, and 4-breakpoint responsive layout.

name: webgl2-fallback-author
description: Transpiles or authors equivalent GLSL 3.0 fallback shaders for WebGPU scenes. Ensures tier-1 browser compatibility.

name: webgpu-shader-author
description: Authors WGSL compute and fragment shaders for WebGPU-capable browsers. Provides WebGL2 fallback strategy via scene-director.

name: woocommerce-integration-author
description: Scaffolds WooCommerce REST API integration: product grids, cart management, order flows, and DNA-themed checkout.
